summary: The diff implements most requirements from the build request. All major pages (Dashboard, Watchlist, Portfolio, AI Assistant) are present, backend Motoko actor is implemented in a single file, dark terminal design is applied, and AI assistant uses rule-based logic. The primary gap is the absence of the two required generated image assets (REQ-7), though their expected paths are referenced in the code. The backend watchlist lacks an explicit 'update' operation (only add/remove). Mode switching clears conversation as required. Overall implementation is comprehensive with no significant hallucinated features.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a dark trading terminal-style app logo/icon (tradeiq-logo.dim_128x128.png) and a dashboard hero banner image (dashboard-hero.dim_1200x300.png) stored in frontend/public/assets/generated
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added binary image files. The code references /assets/generated/tradeiq-logo.dim_128x128.png and /assets/generated/dashboard-hero.dim_1200x300.png but neither image file appears in the added files list. The diff summary notes 11 files were omitted due to limits, so the images may exist but cannot be confirmed from the available evidence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend watchlist must support update (not just add/remove) per CRUD requirement for watchlist items
missing_requirements.reason: The backend main.mo exposes addToWatchlist and removeFromWatchlist but no updateWatchlistItem method. The addToWatchlist even traps if the asset already exists, meaning it cannot be used to update.
